# UC-10.17.4 · SonicWall Gateway Anti-Virus Detections by Signature Family (SonicWall)

## Description

Gateway AV catches malware at the perimeter before it reaches endpoints. Clustering by signature family shows active campaigns versus one-off alerts.

## Value

Reduces dwell time for commodity malware and supports threat-intel feedback to the SOC.

## Implementation

Ensure GAV alerts include file hash and signature name. Correlate with email logs if HTTP downloads follow suspicious SMTP.

## SPL

```spl
index=netfw sourcetype="dell:sonicwall:firewall" earliest=-24h
| search "Gateway Anti-Virus" OR GAV OR virus OR malware
| rex field=_raw "(?i)signature[\s:]+(?<sig>[^,\n]+)"
| stats count by sig, src_ip, dst_ip
| sort -count
```

## Visualization

Pie chart (signature families), timeline (detection rate), table (src, dest, hash).

## References

- [Splunkbase — Dell SonicWall Add-on for Splunk](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/6203)
- [Splunk Connect for Syslog — Dell SonicWall reference](https://docs.splunk.com/Documentation/SC4S/latest/)
